# QC-04: Pull Request Creation & Review

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

All implementation work — whether produced by humans, agents, or both — converges into a pull request that includes evidence from every other Stage 3 control. The PR must be reviewed and approved by the appropriate number of reviewers before merge. Reviewer count and seniority are determined by the risk classification from RC-01.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 3 | Coding & Implementation | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent creates, human reviews |
| **Agent does** | Create pull request with all Stage 3 control evidence attached; assign reviewers per risk tier. |
| **Human does** | Review all evidence; review code; approve or request changes; log approval with identity and timestamp. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Implementation code | Code produced by human developers, agents, or both during Stage 3. |  |
| Stage 3 control evidence | Evidence artefacts from QC-05, RC-04, SC-07, SC-08, SC-09, and GC-03. |  |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Approved pull request | artefact | Merged PR with full evidence package and reviewer approvals recorded. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Tech Lead |

PRs with failing controls or unresolved review comments cannot be merged.

## Dependencies

- `QC-05`
- `RC-04`
- `SC-07`
- `SC-08`
- `SC-09`
- `GC-03`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(5) | Documented procedures for ICT change management including peer review |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Engineering · **Owner role:** Tech Lead
